name: @pyreon/native-runtime-kotlin
description: PRIVATE / EXPERIMENTAL — Kotlin runtime that compiler-emitted Compose code links against on Android. Parallel to @pyreon/native-runtime-swift. Phase 0+ scaffold; first real module is PyreonStorage (Compose + DataStore-backed persistent state).

scripts.build: if command -v kotlinc >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonFetch && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonForm && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonPermissions && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonI18n && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonNetworkStatus && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonClipboard && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonReactivity && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonTokens && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonViewModifier && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonGeolocation && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonAuth && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonSecureStorage && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonPushNotifications && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonHttp && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonDatabase && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonPayments && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonWebSocket && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonMapState && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonWebSocketOkHttp --typecheck-only; else echo '[native-runtime-kotlin] kotlinc not on PATH; skipping build (Android stack required)'; fi
scripts.test: if command -v kotlinc >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonFetch && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonForm && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonPermissions && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonI18n && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonNetworkStatus && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonClipboard && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonHaptics && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonShare && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonReactivity && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonTokens && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonViewModifier && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonGeolocation && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonAuth && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonSecureStorage && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonPushNotifications && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonHttp && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonDatabase && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonPayments && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonWebSocket && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonMapState && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonWebSocketOkHttp --typecheck-only && bun scripts/run-kotlin-tests.ts; else echo '[native-runtime-kotlin] kotlinc not on PATH; skipping test (Android stack required)'; fi
scripts.lint: echo '[native-runtime-kotlin] Kotlin lint (detekt/ktlint) not yet integrated; skipping lint'
scripts.typecheck: if [ "$CI" = "true" ]; then echo '[native-runtime-kotlin] skipping typecheck in CI — kotlinc cold-start + parallel-load timeouts; covered by @pyreon/native-compiler K-FINAL gate (#888) which validates the same K4 stub surface end-to-end'; elif command -v kotlinc >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonFetch --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonForm --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonPermissions --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonI18n --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonNetworkStatus --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonClipboard --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonReactivity --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonTokens --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonViewModifier --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonGeolocation --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonAuth --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonSecureStorage --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonPushNotifications --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonHttp --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonDatabase --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonPayments --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonWebSocket --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonMapState --typecheck-only && bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --service=PyreonWebSocketOkHttp --typecheck-only; else echo '[native-runtime-kotlin] kotlinc not on PATH; skipping typecheck'; fi
